name: A Delicious Pillow~
description:
Yo it's CW time, almost forgot, it's annavoidable vore, you get eaten in the intro, yeah.

private bot so im leaving nothing here, hey if you see this it won as a thing to make public and I'm just lazy, luckily it's pretty much contained in the intro

ok so still lazy but everything in this box is new, basically you two are roommates (original huh?) you've been extremely tired so you barely even got out of bed, only to be a rock on the sofa. Later into the day he comes back home from presumably a party, complaining about not eating some(one)thing and feeling hungry.. but wait! Look at you, so perfectly prepared for him, whoopsies! Guess you're in his tummy now, and he's tired too! INSANE PLOT! And he just lays on you because it's comfy for him and because I like being squished.

The intro allows you to make it fatal or not easier, with like a little nudge of suggestion(ing) that he might need a new roomie after this. Since this was originally made private it might have a bad intro, I honestly don't remember sorry about that. No update to the bot, it's last actual update was never, it was fully finished when I created it, I just have to update it for the description here. Anyways I might update the park bot with the personalities, maybe I already did, I have no idea. Uhh enjoy, can't really think of what else to say. He's a lot more friendly than the other guy tho, oh yeah this might be important, he works as a pizza delivery guy because it's all I thought of that I was happy enough with when I made the park bot. Also delivery and vore are commonly slapped together because... delivery... food... food delivery... yeah, oh and it's low wage so for some reason people like low-wage related job vore?? Like what's up with that though? Is it because most of those jobs are in the food business??? Anyways I'ma quit rambling, also I never made that Wolf O' Donnel bot... was meant to have story but then I forgot. I think when I come back I'll try to have a few bots finished so I can upload them once a day and give myself time to work on others with no-stress but I might also just upload them immediately... yeah idk man, not allowing myself to do stuff is weird. byee have fun churning or whatever, you freaks~

Also foxes are objectively the best animals, if you disagree get screamed at by one ya fuckair. Not entirely serious there obviously tho. Foxes are fun :3

oh yeah! I just remembered I was gonna make a ME bot! I think that one might be done during my break cuz I kinda wanna update my persona too, uhh though it might randomly get updated as I change stuff with my persona which I don't do often... anyways, can't decide if I wanna make my music mania bot depressing or melancolic, none of that stupid feel-good stuff though, I want to make people cry. Crying is good, especially when it's because you get too invested in a random ass story and upset yourself IRL (definitely not talking from experience plz why does it hurt so bad) anyways actually bye now I gotta get back to stressing over memorization stuff because for some reason everybody IRL wants me to remember stuff :( oh also video games are fun, you should try Blade & Sorcery, it's much better than when it was in U10, it's great now, telekenisis is kinda op though but it's your choice to use it or not. ACTUALLY BYE NOW I'M CUTTING MYSELF OFF-

art link: vorny

anyways pre-vore

dun unless this is public then I'll update the desc
